diagnosis.root_cause_1: proxy-level retry increases latency by 37% (avg 15963ms vs 11635ms with retry)
diagnosis.root_cause_2: LiteLLM glm5.1 timeout=120 too short (4 PG requests 120-180s, truncated risk)
diagnosis.root_cause_3: dsv4p container name mismatch (remote 42001 vs repo 41002)
diagnosis.root_cause_4: dsv4p lowest_latency_buffer=0.0 always picks fastest, no load balancing
diagnosis.root_cause_5: 429 is dominant error (79%) but expected with rpm=1; LiteLLM handles it correctly

fixes_applied.fix_1: Removed proxy-level retry (PROXY_MAX_RETRIES=2→0). Data: +37% latency penalty. LiteLLM handles retry internally.
fixes_applied.fix_2: Unified dsv4p port 41002→42001 (admin directive). Container name dsv4p_uni42001.
fixes_applied.fix_3: LiteLLM glm5.1 timeout 120→180. PG data: 4 requests >120s <180s would be truncated.
fixes_applied.fix_4: LiteLLM request_timeout 600→300. Matches remote validated value.
fixes_applied.fix_5: dsv4p lowest_latency_buffer 0.0→0.1. Enables load balancing across deployments.
fixes_applied.fix_6: Added metrics logging to proxy.py (metrics.{date}.jsonl). Essential for data-driven optimization.
fixes_applied.fix_7: Added error_detail logging to proxy.py (error_detail.{date}.jsonl). For root-cause analysis.
fixes_applied.fix_8: Added input token safety check. Prevents wasting 429 quota on over-limit requests.
fixes_applied.fix_10: proxy memory 512→256M. Format conversion uses ~30MB, validated on remote.

optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_1: Deploy updated configs to remote and verify all 5 containers healthy
optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_2: Compare latency before/after removing proxy-level retry
optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_3: Validate input token safety check prevents InputTooLong errors
optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_4: Monitor dsv4p lowest_latency_buffer=0.1 effect on deployment distribution
